bird.name: Bolivian spinetail
bird.summary: The Bolivian spinetail (Cranioleuca henricae) is a vulnerable species of bird in the Furnariinae subfamily of the ovenbird family Furnariid…

relations.subject: Bolivian spinetail
relations.evidence: The species may qualify for a higher threat category in the future." A host of processes threaten it: logging, conversion of forest to Eucalyptus plantations and grazing land, fire, landslides, and climate change do or can contribute to its decline
relations.object_summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。
